sentences.sentence: The professional career paths available to graduates from courses relating to human movement and sport science are as diverse as the graduate's imagination.
sentences.translation: 修读人体运动与体育科学相关课程的毕业生，其职业发展道路之多样，几乎可以任由毕业生发挥想象。

structure.text: The professional career paths
available to graduates
from courses relating to human movement and sport science
relating to human movement and sport science
are as diverse as the graduate's imagination

difficult_points: available to graduates 和 from courses ... 逐层修饰 career paths。
relating to ... 是现在分词短语修饰 courses；as diverse as 用夸张比较强调职业选择丰富。

sentences.sentence: However, undergraduate courses with this type of content, in Australia as well as in most other Western countries, were originally designed as preparation programmes for Physical Education (PE) teachers.
sentences.translation: 然而，在澳大利亚以及大多数其他西方国家，包含这类内容的本科课程最初都被设计为体育教师的职前培养项目。

structure.text: undergraduate courses with this type of content
in Australia as well as in most other Western countries
were originally designed as preparation programmes
for Physical Education (PE) teachers

difficult_points: in Australia ... 是插入的范围状语，不影响主干 courses were designed。
be designed as 表示被设计成某种项目；as well as 连接澳大利亚和其他西方国家。

sentences.sentence: The initial programmes commenced soon after the conclusion of World War II in the mid-1940s.
sentences.translation: 最初的培养项目在20世纪40年代中期第二次世界大战结束后不久启动。

structure.text: The initial programmes
commenced
soon after the conclusion of World War II
in the mid-1940s

difficult_points: commenced 在此为不及物用法，表示项目开始实施。
soon after ... 与 in the mid-1940s 共同定位时间。

sentences.sentence: One of the primary motives for these initiatives was the fact that, during the war effort, so many of the men who were assessed for military duty had been declared unfit.
sentences.translation: 采取这些举措的主要动机之一是：战争期间，许多接受服役评估的男性被判定为不适合服役。

structure.text: One of the primary motives for these initiatives
was the fact
that, during the war effort, so many of the men who were assessed for military duty had been declared unfit
who were assessed for military duty
had been declared unfit

difficult_points: that 从句是 fact 的同位语，说明具体事实。
who 从句修饰 men；had been declared 使用过去完成时被动，表示判定发生在相关政策出台前。
unfit 在军事语境中指身体条件不适合服役。

expressions.text: one of the primary motives for

sentences.sentence: The government saw the solution in the providing of Physical Education programmes in schools, delivered by better prepared and specifically educated PE teachers.
sentences.translation: 政府认为，解决办法是在学校开设体育课程，并由准备更充分、受过专门教育的体育教师授课。

structure.text: The government
saw the solution
in the providing of Physical Education programmes in schools
delivered by better prepared and specifically educated PE teachers

difficult_points: see the solution in 表示认为解决方案在于某事；原文 the providing of 表达生硬但必须保留。
delivered by ... 后置修饰 programmes，说明课程由谁实施。

sentences.sentence: Later, in the 1970s and early 1980s, the surplus of Australians graduating with a PE degree obliged institutions delivering this qualification to identify new employment opportunities for their graduates, resulting in the first appearance of degrees catering for recreation professionals.
sentences.translation: 后来，在20世纪70年代和80年代初，持体育教育学位毕业的澳大利亚人供过于求，迫使提供这类学历的院校为毕业生寻找新的就业机会，由此首次出现了面向休闲娱乐专业人员的学位。

structure.text: the surplus of Australians graduating with a PE degree
graduating with a PE degree
obliged institutions delivering this qualification
delivering this qualification
to identify new employment opportunities for their graduates
resulting in the first appearance of degrees catering for recreation professionals

difficult_points: oblige + 宾语 + to do 表示迫使院校采取行动。
三个现在分词短语分别修饰 Australians、institutions 和 degrees；resulting in 表示整件事产生的结果。
the surplus of Australians 指相关专业毕业生人数超过市场需求。

sentences.sentence: In many instances, this diversity of programme delivery merely led to degrees, delivered by physical educators, as a sideline activity to the production of PE teachers.
sentences.translation: 在许多情况下，这种课程设置的多样化只是催生了一些由体育教育工作者顺带开设的学位项目，而培养体育教师仍是其主要工作。

structure.text: In many instances
this diversity of programme delivery
merely led to degrees
delivered by physical educators
as a sideline activity to the production of PE teachers

difficult_points: delivered by ... 插入修饰 degrees，说明项目提供者。
as a sideline activity 表示这些学位只是培养体育教师之外的附带业务。

sentences.sentence: Whilst the need to produce Physical Education teachers remains a significant social need, and most developed societies demand the availability of quality leisure programmes for their citizens, the career options of graduates within this domain are still developing.
sentences.translation: 尽管培养体育教师仍是一项重要社会需求，而且大多数发达社会都要求为公民提供优质休闲项目，但这一领域毕业生的职业选择仍在不断发展。

structure.text: Whilst the need to produce Physical Education teachers remains a significant social need
and most developed societies demand the availability of quality leisure programmes for their citizens
the career options of graduates within this domain
are still developing

difficult_points: Whilst 引导让步从句，并与 and 后的分句共同构成长前置背景。
主句直到 the career options ... 才开始；within this domain 修饰 graduates。

expressions.meaning_zh: 仍是一项重要社会需求

sentences.sentence: The two most evident growth domains are in the area of the professional delivery of sport, and the role of a physical lifestyle for community health.
sentences.translation: 两个最明显的增长领域，一是体育活动的专业化提供，二是积极运动的生活方式在社区健康中的作用。

structure.text: The two most evident growth domains
are
in the area of the professional delivery of sport, and the role of a physical lifestyle for community health

difficult_points: 句末由 and 连接两个增长方向，虽然原文介词结构并不完全平行，仍应按原文理解。
a physical lifestyle 指经常参与身体活动的生活方式。

sentences.sentence: The sports industry is developing at an unprecedented rate of growth.
sentences.translation: 体育产业正以前所未有的速度增长。

structure.text: The sports industry
is developing
at an unprecedented rate of growth

difficult_points: 现在进行时强调体育产业正处在快速发展过程中。
at a rate of growth 表示按某种增长速度；unprecedented 表示前所未有。

sentences.sentence: From a business perspective, sport is now seen as an area with the potential for high returns.
sentences.translation: 从商业角度看，体育如今被视为一个具有高回报潜力的领域。

structure.text: From a business perspective
sport
is now seen as an area
with the potential for high returns

difficult_points: be seen as 是被动结构，表示被市场参与者视为。
with 短语修饰 area；returns 在商业语境中指投资回报。

sentences.sentence: It is quite significant that the businessman Rupert Murdoch broadened his business base from media to sport, having purchased an American baseball team and an Australian Rugby League competition, as well as seeking opportunities to invest in an English football club.
sentences.translation: 值得注意的是，商人鲁珀特·默多克把自己的商业版图从媒体扩展到体育：他收购了一支美国棒球队和一项澳大利亚橄榄球联赛，同时还寻求投资一家英格兰足球俱乐部的机会。

structure.text: It is quite significant
that the businessman Rupert Murdoch broadened his business base from media to sport
having purchased an American baseball team and an Australian Rugby League competition
as well as seeking opportunities to invest in an English football club

difficult_points: It 是形式主语，that 从句是真正主语。
having purchased 表示收购发生在或构成其拓展商业版图的先行动作。
as well as 连接 having purchased 与 seeking；to invest 修饰 opportunities。

sentences.sentence: No business person of such international stature would see fit to invest in sport unless he was satisfied that this was a sound business venture with ideal revenue-generating opportunities.
sentences.translation: 任何具有如此国际地位的商人，除非确信体育是一项稳健且具有理想创收机会的商业投资，否则都不会认为投资体育是合适的。

structure.text: No business person of such international stature
would see fit to invest in sport
unless he was satisfied
that this was a sound business venture with ideal revenue-generating opportunities

difficult_points: No ... would ... unless ... 构成否定条件逻辑，意为只有确信有利可图才会投资。
see fit to do 表示认为做某事合适；that 从句作 satisfied 的宾语。
this 指投资体育；of such international stature 修饰 business person。

sentences.sentence: These developments have confirmed sport as a business with professional management structures, marketing processes, and development strategies in place.
sentences.translation: 这些发展已经确认，体育是一项具备专业管理结构、营销流程和发展战略的产业。

structure.text: These developments
have confirmed sport as a business
with professional management structures, marketing processes, and development strategies in place

difficult_points: confirm A as B 表示确认 A 具有 B 的性质。
with ... in place 是 with 复合结构，表示相关体系已经建立到位。

sentences.sentence: They have indicated new and developing career paths for graduates of human movement science, sport science, exercise science and related degrees.
sentences.translation: 这些发展也为人体运动科学、体育科学、运动科学及相关专业的毕业生指明了新兴且不断发展的职业道路。

structure.text: They
have indicated
new and developing career paths
for graduates of human movement science, sport science, exercise science and related degrees

difficult_points: They 回指体育产业的商业化发展。
new and developing 并列修饰 career paths，表示新出现且仍在扩展。

sentences.sentence: Graduates can now visualise career paths extending into such diverse domains as sport management, sport marketing, event and facility management, government policy development pertaining to sport, sport journalism, sport psychology, and sport or athletic coaching.
sentences.translation: 如今，毕业生可以设想自己的职业道路延伸到众多领域，例如体育管理、体育营销、赛事与场馆管理、体育相关政府政策制定、体育新闻、体育心理学，以及体育或竞技训练。

structure.text: Graduates
can now visualise career paths

extending into such diverse domains as sport management, sport marketing, event and facility management, government policy development pertaining to sport, sport journalism, sport psychology, and sport or athletic coaching
pertaining to sport

difficult_points: extending into ... 后置修饰 career paths；such ... as 引出具体领域。
pertaining to sport 修饰 government policy development，而非后面全部项目。

sentences.sentence: Business leaders will only continue their enthusiasm for sport if they receive returns for their money.
sentences.translation: 只有投资能够获得回报，商业领袖才会继续保持对体育的热情。

structure.text: Business leaders
will only continue their enthusiasm for sport
if they receive returns for their money

difficult_points: only 与 if 条件从句共同表达“只有获得回报才会继续”。
returns for their money 指资金投入带来的商业回报。

sentences.sentence: Such returns will only be forthcoming if astute, enthusiastic and properly educated professionals are delivering the programs that earn appropriate financial returns.
sentences.translation: 只有精明、热情且受过适当教育的专业人员负责开展能够产生合理财务回报的项目，这种回报才会实现。

structure.text: Such returns
will only be forthcoming
if astute, enthusiastic and properly educated professionals are delivering the programs
that earn appropriate financial returns

difficult_points: forthcoming 在此表示预期的回报会实际出现。
that 引导定语从句修饰 programs，并在从句中作主语；原文使用 programs 拼写，必须保留。

expressions.meaning_zh: 受过适当教育的专业人员

sentences.sentence: The successful universities of the 21st century will be those that have responded to this challenge by delivering such degrees.
sentences.translation: 二十一世纪成功的大学，将是那些通过开设此类学位课程来回应这一挑战的大学。

structure.text: The successful universities of the 21st century
will be those
that have responded to this challenge
by delivering such degrees

difficult_points: those 替代 universities，that 从句修饰 those。
by + 动名词说明大学回应挑战的方式。

sentences.sentence: A second professional growth area for this group of graduates is associated with community health.
sentences.translation: 这类毕业生的第二个职业增长领域与社区健康有关。

structure.text: A second professional growth area for this group of graduates
is associated with community health

difficult_points: for this group of graduates 修饰 growth area，说明受益群体。
be associated with 在此表示该职业方向与社区健康相关。

sentences.sentence: The increasing demand for government expenditure within health budgets is reaching the stage where most governments are simply unable to function in a manner that is satisfying their constituents.
sentences.translation: 政府卫生预算支出的需求不断增长，正达到这样一个阶段：大多数政府已无法以令选民满意的方式运作。

structure.text: The increasing demand for government expenditure within health budgets
is reaching the stage
where most governments are simply unable to function in a manner
that is satisfying their constituents

difficult_points: where 从句修饰 the stage，表示达到何种局面。
that 从句修饰 a manner；constituents 指政府所服务并对其负责的选民。

sentences.sentence: One of the primary reasons for this problem is the unhelpful emphasis on treatment in medical care programmes.
sentences.translation: 造成这一问题的主要原因之一，是医疗项目对疾病治疗作了不利的过度强调。

structure.text: One of the primary reasons for this problem
is the unhelpful emphasis on treatment
in medical care programmes

difficult_points: One of 后接复数 reasons，但主语中心为 One，系动词用 is。
unhelpful emphasis 表示这种侧重不利于解决预算问题。

expressions.text: one of the primary reasons for

sentences.sentence: Governments have traditionally given their senior health official the title of 'Minister for Health', when in fact this officer has functioned as 'Minister for Sickness and the Construction of Hospitals'.
sentences.translation: 各国政府历来把高级卫生官员称为“卫生部长”，但事实上，这位官员所发挥的作用更像是“疾病与医院建设部长”。

structure.text: Governments
have traditionally given their senior health official the title of 'Minister for Health'
when in fact this officer has functioned as 'Minister for Sickness and the Construction of Hospitals'

difficult_points: give somebody the title of ... 是双宾语结构。
when 在此不是单纯时间关系，而是带转折意味的“其实”；this officer 回指 senior health official。

sentences.sentence: Government focus simply has to change.
sentences.translation: 政府的工作重心必须改变。

structure.text: Government focus
simply has to change

difficult_points: Government 作名词定语修饰 focus。
has to 表示客观必要性，simply 加强“必须改变”的语气。

sentences.sentence: If the change is not brought about for philosophical reasons, it will occur naturally, because insufficient funding will be available to address the ever-increasing costs of medical support.
sentences.translation: 如果这种改变不是出于理念上的原因主动促成，也会自然发生，因为届时将没有足够资金应对不断上涨的医疗保障成本。

structure.text: If the change is not brought about for philosophical reasons
it will occur naturally
because insufficient funding will be available to address the ever-increasing costs of medical support
to address the ever-increasing costs of medical support

difficult_points: is not brought about 是被动结构，bring about 意为促成；it 指 the change。
because 从句说明改变必然发生的财政原因；to address 修饰 available funding 的用途。

sentences.sentence: Graduates of human movement, exercise science and sport science have the potential to become major players in this shift in policy focus.
sentences.translation: 人体运动、运动科学和体育科学专业的毕业生，有潜力成为这场政策重心转移中的主要推动者。

structure.text: Graduates of human movement, exercise science and sport science
have the potential
to become major players in this shift in policy focus

difficult_points: to become ... 修饰 potential，说明潜力的具体方向。
major players 是比喻，指在政策转向中发挥重要作用的人。

sentences.sentence: It is these graduates who already have the skills, knowledge and understanding to initiate community health education programmes to reduce cardio-vascular disease, to reduce medical dependency upon diabetes, to improve workplace health leading to increased productivity, to initiate and promote programmes of activity for the elderly that reduce medical dependency, and to maintain an active lifestyle for the unemployed and disadvantaged groups in society.
sentences.translation: 正是这些毕业生已经具备相应的技能、知识和理解力，能够开展社区健康教育项目以减少心血管疾病，降低糖尿病患者对医疗的依赖，改善职场健康并提高生产力，发起和推广可降低老年人医疗依赖的活动项目，以及帮助失业者和社会弱势群体保持积极的生活方式。

structure.text: It is these graduates who already have the skills, knowledge and understanding
who already have the skills, knowledge and understanding

to initiate community health education programmes to reduce cardio-vascular disease, to reduce medical dependency upon diabetes, to improve workplace health leading to increased productivity, to initiate and promote programmes of activity for the elderly that reduce medical dependency, and to maintain an active lifestyle for the unemployed and disadvantaged groups in society
leading to increased productivity
that reduce medical dependency

difficult_points: It is ... who ... 是强调句，突出 these graduates。
skills, knowledge and understanding 后接一长串并列不定式，说明毕业生能开展的工作。
leading to ... 表示改善职场健康的结果；that 从句修饰 programmes of activity。
原文 medical dependency upon diabetes 搭配异常，应保留原文并按“糖尿病相关的医疗依赖”理解。

expressions.meaning_zh: 开展社区健康教育项目

sentences.sentence: This is the graduate that governments will be calling upon to shift the community focus from medical dependency to healthy lifestyles in the decades ahead.
sentences.translation: 未来几十年，政府将依靠这类毕业生推动社区重心从依赖医疗转向健康生活方式。

structure.text: This is the graduate
that governments will be calling upon
to shift the community focus from medical dependency to healthy lifestyles
in the decades ahead

difficult_points: that 引导定语从句修饰 the graduate，并作 call upon 的宾语。
call upon somebody to do 表示要求或依靠某人做某事；shift ... from ... to ... 表示重心转移。

sentences.sentence: The career paths of these graduates are developing at a pace that is not evident in other professions.
sentences.translation: 这些毕业生的职业道路正以其他专业领域中并不常见的速度发展。

structure.text: The career paths of these graduates
are developing
at a pace
that is not evident in other professions

difficult_points: that 引导定语从句修饰 a pace。
be evident in 在此表示这种发展速度在其他职业中并不明显或常见。

sentences.sentence: The contribution that these graduates can make to society, and the recognition of this contribution is at an unprecedented high, and all indications are that it will continue to grow.
sentences.translation: 这些毕业生能够为社会作出的贡献，以及社会对这种贡献的认可，都处于前所未有的高位；各种迹象表明，这种认可还会继续提高。

structure.text: The contribution
that these graduates can make to society
and the recognition of this contribution
is at an unprecedented high
and all indications are
that it will continue to grow

difficult_points: 原文把 contribution 与 recognition 作为并列概念，却使用单数 is，属于源文一致性异常，必须原样保留。
第一个 that 是定语从句，修饰 contribution；第二个 that 是表语从句，说明 indications 的内容。
it 的具体指代略含混，结合语境主要指贡献及其社会认可的发展水平。
